---
title: "Oncosubtypes"
author: "Daniel Schulz"
date: "2026-07-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# libraries
```{r}
library(OncoSubtype)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
```

# load data

```{r}
rna_mat <- readRDS("/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing/rna_mat.rds")
rna_mat <- t(rna_mat)

# split RNA mat by histology
clin <- read.csv("/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing/all_traits.csv")
LUAD <- clin %>% filter(simple_histology == "Adenocarcinoma") %>% pull(immucan_id)
LUSC <- clin %>% filter(simple_histology == "Squamous cell carcinoma") %>% pull(immucan_id)

clin <- clin %>%
  mutate(LUAD_vs_LUSC = case_when(
    LUAD_vs_LUSC == "Adenocarcinoma"          ~ "LUAD",
    LUAD_vs_LUSC == "Squamous cell carcinoma" ~ "LUSC",
    TRUE                                       ~ "Other"
  ))
#  clinical annotation
clin$simple_histology
clin$EGFR
clin$KRAS
clin$TP53
clin$TPS_score
```

# predict subtypes
```{r}
rna_LUAD <- rna_mat[,colnames(rna_mat) %in% LUAD]
rna_LUSC <- rna_mat[,colnames(rna_mat) %in% LUSC]

# Median-center your expression matrix first
data_LUAD <- get_median_centered(rna_LUAD, log2 = FALSE)
data_LUSC <- get_median_centered(rna_LUSC, log2 = FALSE)

# LUAD: returns bronchioid / magnoid / squamoid (= TRU / PP / PI)
output_luad <- centroids_subtype(data_LUAD, disease = 'LUAD')

# LUSC: returns basal / classical / secretory / primitive
output_lusc <- centroids_subtype(data_LUSC, disease = 'LUSC')

table(output_luad@subtypes)  # bronchioid / magnoid / squamoid
table(output_lusc@subtypes)  # basal / classical / secretory / primitive


# QC
top_genes_LUAD <- luad_centroids %>%
  mutate(range = apply(., 1, function(x) max(x) - min(x))) %>%
  slice_max(range, n = 100) %>%
  rownames()
top_genes_LUSC <- lusc_centroids %>%
  mutate(range = apply(., 1, function(x) max(x) - min(x))) %>%
  slice_max(range, n = 100) %>%
  rownames()

top_genes <- c(top_genes_LUAD, top_genes_LUSC)

# ── Build subtype vector (patient ID → subtype label) ─────────────────────────
# @subtypes may or may not be named; use input colnames to be safe
luad_sub    <- setNames(as.character(output_luad@subtypes), colnames(rna_LUAD))
lusc_sub    <- setNames(as.character(output_lusc@subtypes), colnames(rna_LUSC))
subtype_all <- c(luad_sub, lusc_sub)

# get scores
sc <- as.data.frame(output_luad@score)
sc$immucan_id <- rownames(sc)
rownames(sc) <- NULL
# export data
tumor_subtypes <- data.frame(immucan_id = names(subtype_all),
                             subtype = subtype_all)

write.csv(tumor_subtypes,"/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing/tumor_subtypes.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
write.csv(sc,"/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing/tumor_subtype_scores.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
```

# Heatmap
```{r}

# ── Build annotation data frame for all patients ──────────────────────────────
pt_ids <- colnames(rna_mat)
idx    <- match(pt_ids, clin$immucan_id)
ann_df <- data.frame(
  subtype   = subtype_all[pt_ids],
  histology = clin$LUAD_vs_LUSC[idx],
  EGFR      = as.character(clin$EGFR[idx]),
  KRAS      = as.character(clin$KRAS[idx]),
  TP53      = as.character(clin$TP53[idx]),
  TPS       = as.character(clin$TPS_score[idx]) == "positive",
  row.names = pt_ids,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Order columns: LUAD subtypes first, then LUSC, NA last
subtype_order <- c("bronchioid", "magnoid", "squamoid",
                   "basal", "classical", "secretory", "primitive")
col_order <- order(
  match(ann_df$subtype, subtype_order, nomatch = length(subtype_order) + 1),
  na.last = TRUE
)
ann_df <- ann_df[col_order, ]
pt_ids_sorted <- rownames(ann_df)

# ── Row ordering: sort genes by which subtype centroid they are maximal in ─────
sort_by_centroid <- function(genes, cent_mat) {
  g <- genes[genes %in% rownames(cent_mat)]
  names(sort(apply(cent_mat[g, , drop = FALSE], 1, which.max)))
}
luad_g <- sort_by_centroid(top_genes_LUAD, luad_centroids)
lusc_g <- sort_by_centroid(top_genes_LUSC, lusc_centroids)
luad_g <- luad_g[luad_g %in% rownames(rna_mat)]
lusc_g <- lusc_g[lusc_g %in% rownames(rna_mat)]
row_order <- c(luad_g, lusc_g)

row_split_vec <- factor(
  ifelse(row_order %in% top_genes_LUAD, "LUAD genes", "LUSC genes"),
  levels = c("LUAD genes", "LUSC genes")
)

# ── Z-score within each histology to reveal within-histology subtype signal ───
# All-patient z-scoring lets between-histology differences dominate, masking
# the subtler within-histology subtype variation. Score each gene set only
# against patients of the matching histology.
luad_pts <- pt_ids_sorted[pt_ids_sorted %in% colnames(rna_LUAD)]
lusc_pts <- pt_ids_sorted[pt_ids_sorted %in% colnames(rna_LUSC)]
na_pts   <- setdiff(pt_ids_sorted, c(luad_pts, lusc_pts))

z_luad <- t(scale(t(rna_mat[luad_g, luad_pts, drop = FALSE])))
z_lusc <- t(scale(t(rna_mat[lusc_g, lusc_pts, drop = FALSE])))

all_pts <- c(luad_pts, lusc_pts, na_pts)
heatmap_mat <- matrix(NA,
  nrow = length(row_order), ncol = length(all_pts),
  dimnames = list(row_order, all_pts))
heatmap_mat[luad_g, luad_pts] <- z_luad
heatmap_mat[lusc_g, lusc_pts] <- z_lusc

ann_df <- ann_df[all_pts, ]

# ── Colors ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
subtype_pal <- c(
  bronchioid = "#4DBBD5", magnoid   = "#00A087", squamoid  = "#3C5488",
  basal      = "#E64B35", classical = "#F39B7F", secretory = "#8491B4",
  primitive  = "#B09C85"
)

# Auto-detect histology color keys from actual values in the data
hist_vals <- sort(unique(na.omit(ann_df$histology)))
hist_pal  <- setNames(c("#4DBBD5", "#E64B35", "orange")[seq_along(hist_vals)], hist_vals)

# Mutations stored as TRUE/FALSE: TRUE = mutated (red), FALSE = WT (grey)
mut_col <- function(x) {
  vals <- sort(unique(na.omit(x)))
  c(setNames(rep("#E41A1C", sum(vals == "TRUE")),  vals[vals == "TRUE"]),
    setNames(rep("#D9D9D9", sum(vals == "FALSE")), vals[vals == "FALSE"]))
}

col_ann <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  subtype   = ann_df$subtype,
  histology = ann_df$histology,
  EGFR      = ann_df$EGFR,
  KRAS      = ann_df$KRAS,
  TP53      = ann_df$TP53,
  TPS       = ann_df$TPS,
  col = list(
    subtype   = subtype_pal,
    histology = hist_pal,
    EGFR      = mut_col(ann_df$EGFR),
    KRAS      = mut_col(ann_df$KRAS),
    TP53      = mut_col(ann_df$TP53),
    TPS       = mut_col(ann_df$TPS)
  ),
  na_col               = "grey80",
  annotation_name_side = "left",
  annotation_name_gp   = gpar(fontsize = 9)
)

# ── Heatmap 2: all-patient z-score (original view) ───────────────────────────
heatmap_mat_all <- t(scale(t(rna_mat[row_order, all_pts, drop = FALSE])))

ht2 <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat_all,
  col                   = colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("blue", "white", "red")),
  top_annotation        = col_ann,
  cluster_rows          = FALSE,
  cluster_columns       = FALSE,
  row_split             = row_split_vec,
  column_split          = ann_df$histology,
  cluster_row_slices    = FALSE,
  cluster_column_slices = FALSE,
  show_column_names     = FALSE,
  show_row_names        = TRUE,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3)
)

pdf(file = "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/revised_figures/Figure_3_supp/tumor_subtypes.pdf",width = 8,height = 8)
draw(ht2)
dev.off()
```

# export scores
